title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Any traitors who were exposed mid-reb
content:
✔ Any traitors who were exposed mid-rebellion face additional penalties.

✅ Why This Works:
• Adds high-stakes political/social gameplay to the course.
• Encourages faction-based storytelling and persuasion tactics.
• Forces players to consider the risks and benefits of challenging authority.

📜 3. Secret Skill Checks & Hidden Paths

📜 Not all players will have access to the same choices—some paths are hidden.

✔ Some students will see the standard choices (publicly known challenges).
✔ Others will have access to secret options (hidden based on XP, alignment, or archetype).
✔ Secret choices will often come with social risk—players must decide if they reveal them to others.

Example: Week 7 – The Existential Choice
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 277 (chunk 277/555)
